steps.title: Connect wavelength to images
steps.content: The JWST is optimized for infrared wavelengths. When distant galaxies' light is infrared, that optimization explains why the JWST can produce sharper, more informative images than Hubble could.

steps.title: Signal the result
steps.content: Choice B signals concession, Choice C signals correction, and Choice D signals addition. The relationship is cause and effect: infrared optimization leads to better images when the light is infrared. The answer is A.
